KEINEMOD-STRIKE_KEINE.title: Strike
KEINEMOD-DEFEND_KEINE.title: Defend
KEINEMOD-DROPLET_OF_TIME.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you have no [gold]Full Moon[/gold], [gold]Time Shift[/gold] {TimeShiftPower:diff()}.
KEINEMOD-DROPLET_OF_TIME.title: Droplet of Time
KEINEMOD-MANIPULATE_HISTORY.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[blue]Human[/blue]: [gold]Consume[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show: up to|} {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
[green]Hakutaku[/green]: [gold]Create[/gold] a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Scroll of Valor+|Scroll of Valor}[/gold].
KEINEMOD-MANIPULATE_HISTORY.title: Manipulate History
KEINEMOD-RESHAPE_HISTORY.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
[blue]Human[/blue]: [gold]Consume[/gold] up to {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
[green]Hakutaku[/green]: Choose {IfUpgraded:show:an [gold]Upgraded[/gold]|a} [gold]Sacred Treasure[/gold] to [gold]Create[/gold].
KEINEMOD-RESHAPE_HISTORY.title: Reshape History
KEINEMOD-SCROLL_OF_VALOR.title: Scroll of Valor
KEINEMOD-HEAVENLY_SWORD.title: Heavenly Sword
KEINEMOD-SCROLL_OF_BENEVOLENCE.title: Scroll of Benevolence
KEINEMOD-CURVED_JEWEL.title: Curved Jewel
KEINEMOD-SCROLL_OF_WISDOM.title: Scroll of Wisdom
KEINEMOD-EIGHT_SPAN_MIRROR.description: This turn, your next {MirroredPower:plural:card is|{:diff()} cards are} played an extra time.
KEINEMOD-EIGHT_SPAN_MIRROR.title: Eight-Span Mirror
KEINEMOD-FLOW.title: Flow
KEINEMOD-FATIGUE.description:
[gold]Consumed[/gold]: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] this card.
[gold]Exhausted[/gold]: Draw 1 less card next turn.
KEINEMOD-FATIGUE.title: Fatigue
KEINEMOD-SLAY_THE_SERPENT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[blue]Human[/blue]: [gold]Consume[/gold] 1 card, if it is [gold]Snakebite[/gold] or [gold]Serpent Form[/gold], [gold]Create[/gold] a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Heavenly Sword+|Heavenly Sword}[/gold].
[green]Hakutaku[/green]: [gold]Create[/gold] a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Serpent Form|Snakebite}[/gold].
KEINEMOD-SLAY_THE_SERPENT.title: Slay the Serpent
KEINEMOD-KEINE_AHNUNG.title: Keine Ahnung
KEINEMOD-THE_SMARTEST.description:
Does NOTHING!
[gold]Consumed[/gold]: If costs 0, [gold]Transform[/gold] this into [gold]THE STRONGEST[/gold]; Otherwise, does not move to [gold]Scroll[/gold], reduce cost by {CostReduction:diff()} instead.
KEINEMOD-THE_SMARTEST.title: THE SMARTEST
KEINEMOD-THE_STRONGEST.description:
At the end of your turn, deal {OmegaPower:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
{IfUpgraded:show:(Already the STRONGEST, cannot get any stronger)|}
KEINEMOD-THE_STRONGEST.title: THE STRONGEST
KEINEMOD-BURETSU_CRISIS.title: Buretsu Crisis
KEINEMOD-MASAKADO_CRISIS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[blue]Human[/blue]: [gold]Consume[/gold] up to {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}, [gold]Time Shift[/gold] {TimeShiftPower:diff()} for each.
[green]Hakutaku[/green]: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}, [gold]Recall[/gold] up to {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}, gain 1 less {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} for each.
KEINEMOD-MASAKADO_CRISIS.title: Masakado Crisis
KEINEMOD-YOSHIMITSU_CRISIS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[blue]Human[/blue]: [gold]Consume[/gold] up to {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} for each.
[green]Hakutaku[/green]: [gold]Recall[/gold] up to {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for each.
KEINEMOD-YOSHIMITSU_CRISIS.title: Yoshimitsu Crisis
KEINEMOD-GHQ_CRISIS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies {Repeat:diff()} times.
Cost 1 less {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} for each card in your [gold]Scroll[/gold].
[green]Hakutaku[/green]: [gold]Recall[/gold] up to {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards} and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] this card.
KEINEMOD-GHQ_CRISIS.title: GHQ Crisis
KEINEMOD-LEISURE.title: Leisure
KEINEMOD-NEW_SEMESTER.description:
[gold]Knowledgeable[/gold] {Knowledgeable:diff()}.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain {KnowledgePower:diff()} [gold]Knowledge[/gold] if you have less than {Threshold:diff()}; Otherwise, draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
KEINEMOD-NEW_SEMESTER.title: New Semester
KEINEMOD-PHASE_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[blue]Human[/blue]: [gold]Time Shift[/gold] {TimeShiftPower:diff()}.
[green]Hakutaku[/green]: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}, exit your form.
KEINEMOD-PHASE_STRIKE.title: Phase Strike
KEINEMOD-LONG_READ.title: Long Read
KEINEMOD-HEADBUTT_KEINE.title: HEADBUTT!!
KEINEMOD-SCOLD.title: Scold
KEINEMOD-PENETRATING_GAZE.title: Penetrating Gaze
KEINEMOD-REVISION_SESSION.title: Revision Session
KEINEMOD-RESERVED_TIME.title: Reserved Time
KEINEMOD-SWIRL_OF_HISTORY.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and apply {HistoricalGapPower:diff()} [gold]Historical Gap[/gold] to ALL enemies.
[gold]Consumed[/gold]: Apply {Consumed:diff()} [gold]Historical Gap[/gold] to ALL enemies.
KEINEMOD-SWIRL_OF_HISTORY.title: Swirl of History
KEINEMOD-FLOW_OF_HISTORY.title: Flow of History
KEINEMOD-DUAL_FORM.description: Your cards' [blue]Human[/blue] and [green]Hakutaku[/green] effects are considered triggered simultaneously at ALL time.
KEINEMOD-DUAL_FORM.title: Dual Form
KEINEMOD-CONCEAL_HISTORY.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Apply {HistoricalGapPower:diff()} [gold]Historical Gap[/gold].
[blue]Human[/blue]: [gold]Block[/gold] is retained this turn.
[green]Hakutaku[/green]: Enemy's [gold]Historical Gap[/gold] is not lowered this turn.
KEINEMOD-CONCEAL_HISTORY.title: Conceal History
KEINEMOD-BORROWED_TREASURES.title: Borrowed Treasures
KEINEMOD-THREE_SACRED_TREASURES_SWORD.de:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain {ValorPower:diff()} [gold]Valor[/gold].
[gold]Create[/gold] a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Scroll of Valor+|Scroll of Valor}[/gold].
KEINEMOD-THREE_SACRED_TREASURES_ORB.desc:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain {BenevolencePower:diff()} [gold]Benevolence[/gold].
[gold]Create[/gold] a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Scroll of Benevolence+|Scroll of Benevolence}[/gold].
KEINEMOD-THREE_SACRED_TREASURES_MIRROR.d:
Gain {KnowledgePower:diff()} [gold]Knowledge[/gold].
Gain {WisdomPower:diff()} [gold]Wisdom[/gold].
[gold]Create[/gold] a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Scroll of Wisdom+|Scroll of Wisdom}[/gold].
KEINEMOD-INTERTWINED.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Create[/gold] a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Scroll of Benevolence+|Scroll of Benevolence}[/gold] and a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Scroll of Valor+|Scroll of Valor}[/gold].
KEINEMOD-INTERTWINED.title: Intertwined
KEINEMOD-GOOD_APPLE_BAD_APPLE.title: Good Apple Bad Apple
KEINEMOD-SCROLL_SLASH.description:
[gold]Knowledgeable[/gold] {Knowledgeable:diff()}.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
[blue]Human[/blue]: Next turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
[green]Hakutaku[/green]: Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
KEINEMOD-SCROLL_SLASH.title: Scroll Slash
KEINEMOD-SCROLL_STORM.description:
[gold]Knowledgeable[/gold] {Knowledgeable:diff()}.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times.
[blue]Human[/blue]: Gain {KnowledgePower:diff()} [gold]Knowledge[/gold].
[green]Hakutaku[/green]: Hits 1 additional time.
KEINEMOD-SCROLL_STORM.title: Scroll Storm
KEINEMOD-UNOFFICIAL_HISTORY.description:
Apply {HistoricalGapPower:diff()} [gold]Historical Gap[/gold].
Gain {WeakGain:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
[blue]Human[/blue]: Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
[green]Hakutaku[/green]: No longer gains [gold]Weak[/gold].
KEINEMOD-UNOFFICIAL_HISTORY.title: Unofficial History
KEINEMOD-ELEGANCE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Cost 1 less {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} for each card in your [gold]Scroll[/gold].
KEINEMOD-ELEGANCE.title: Elegance
KEINEMOD-LEARN_FROM_PAIN.description:
[gold]Knowledgeable[/gold] {Knowledgeable:diff()}.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[blue]Human[/blue]: [gold]Consume[/gold] 1 card, if it is a Status or Curse, gain {KnowledgePower:diff()} [gold]Knowledge[/gold].
[green]Hakutaku[/green]: Deal damage an additional time.
KEINEMOD-LEARN_FROM_PAIN.title: Learn from Pain
KEINEMOD-KNOWLEDGE_GAP.description:
[gold]Knowledgeable[/gold] {Knowledgeable:diff()}.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply [gold]Historical Gap[/gold] equal to half of damage dealt.
KEINEMOD-KNOWLEDGE_GAP.title: Knowledge Gap
KEINEMOD-LEXICOGRAPHY.title: Lexicography
KEINEMOD-SIPHONING_HISTORY.description:
Remove enemy's [gold]Historical Gap[/gold]. Enemy loses 1 [gold]Strength[/gold] for every {Ratio:diff()} removed.
[green]Hakutaku[/green]: [gold]Create[/gold] a [gold]Splitting History[/gold] to your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
KEINEMOD-SIPHONING_HISTORY.title: Siphoning History
KEINEMOD-SPLITTING_HISTORY.description: {InCombat:Apply {HistoricalGapPower:diff()} [gold]Historical Gap[/gold].|Apply [gold]Historical Gap[/gold] equal to the amount removed.}
KEINEMOD-SPLITTING_HISTORY.title: Splitting History
KEINEMOD-OVERWORKED.title: Overworked
KEINEMOD-FADING_PAST.title: Fading Past
KEINEMOD-HISTORY_OF_UNTRODDEN.descriptio: At the start of your turn, apply {HistoryOfUntroddenPower:diff()} [gold]Historical Gap[/gold] to ALL enemies.
KEINEMOD-HISTORY_OF_UNTRODDEN.title: History of Untrodden Land
KEINEMOD-HISTORY_OF_FANTASY.description: Whenever you generate a card, apply {HistoryOfFantasyPower:diff()} [gold]Historical Gap[/gold] to a random enemies.
KEINEMOD-HISTORY_OF_FANTASY.title: History of Fantasy
KEINEMOD-FEAST_OF_HISTORY.description:
Apply {HistoricalGapPower:diff()} [gold]Historical Gap[/gold] to ALL enemies.
[blue]Human[/blue]: [gold]Consume[/gold] your [gold]Hand[/gold].
[green]Hakutaku[/green]: After apply, double ALL enemies' [gold]Historical Gap[/gold].
KEINEMOD-FEAST_OF_HISTORY.title: Feast of History
KEINEMOD-ANCIENT_PROTECTION.title: Ancient Protection
KEINEMOD-SHIFTING_HISTORY.description:
Apply {HistoricalGapPower:diff()} [gold]Historical Gap[/gold].
[gold]Time Shift[/gold] equal to enemy's [gold]Historical Gap[/gold].
KEINEMOD-SHIFTING_HISTORY.title: Shifting History
